positive: A whimsical, highly detailed illustration of a stylized, magical woodland scene. Center frame features a bioluminescent fox perched on a giant mushroom cap, surrounded by glowing vines, delicate fireflies, and intertwined roots. The style should be highly stylized whimsical illustration, reminiscent of vintage storybook artwork, with clean silhouettes and strong graphic contrast. Use a rich, deep color palette emphasizing sapphire blue, emerald green, and gold accents. Composition should be perfectly balanced and symmetrical, suitable for a central apparel graphic. Hyper-detailed linework, vector art quality, perfect symmetry, vibrant.
negative: blur, watermark, signature, text, noise, artifacts, extra limbs, bad anatomy, disfigured, messy, low detail, messy background, logo, trademark, copyrighted character
